query:
INSERT INTO route (
                    ship_symbol,
                    "from",
                    "to",
                    distance,
                    nav_mode,
                    fuel_cost,
                    travel_time,
                    ship_info_before,
                    ship_info_after
                )
                VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8, $9)
                RETURNING id
